title: trifolium campestre subsp. lagrangei
intro: Trifolium campestre subsp. lagrangei, also known as Lagrange's white clover, is a subspecies of Trifolium campestre, a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium campestre subsp. lagrangei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to treat various health issues.
